title: CommandActions
description: A mod that allows you to do regular actions using commands
body:
# CommandActions

CommandActions allows you to do actions like waking up from a bed, dismounting an entity, disconnecting a server or quiting minecraft using commands.

There are not that many features yet, but more may be coming in the future.

# Commands
/dismount - Dismounts a rideable entity (horse, boat...)

/disconnect - Disconnects you from the current server or singleplayer world

/jump - jumps...

/open_riding_inventory - Opens the current inventory of the entity you are riding on (horse, 
boat with chest)

/wakeup - wakes you up from your bed

/quitmc - quits minecraft
